about.heading: About
about.subheading: A creative mind at the intersection of fashion, technology, and self-expression.

body.p1: Nerudek is a model and digital creator exploring the edges of fashion photography, AI-driven creativity, and authentic online presence. Based in Europe, working globally.
body.p2: Beyond the camera, she writes about vibe coding, experiments with generative tools, and tends to a growing garden — both digital and real. Every project is a blend of precision and play.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about Nerudek and the creative ecosystem.

items.a: Nerudek is a model, content creator, and AI enthusiast exploring the intersection of fashion, photography, and technology. Based in Europe, creating globally.

items.q: How does the AI Agent work?
items.a: The NERUDEK AI engine analyzes creative patterns, color palettes, and trends to generate unique visual experiences and automate creative workflows.
Yes. We use enterprise-grade encryption and follow strict data protection protocols. All processing happens locally where possible.
You can find exclusive content on OnlyFans and Fansly. Public content is shared across Instagram, X/Twitter, and this website.

items.q: How does the user onboarding work?
items.a: Our onboarding process is smooth and intuitive. You are guided through personalization steps to tailor the experience to your preferences.

tools.heading: Creative Tools
tools.subheading: Free, client-side tools running on WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
tools.footnote: All processing happens locally in your browser via WebAssembly. File size limits apply.
